summary: Verified both new features: 1) Live Price Chart with checkbox toggle (data-testid='chart-toggle-{SYMBOL}'), col-span-2 expansion, Y-axis labels, and trailing stop line for tickers with trailing enabled. 2) Preset Strategy Toggle correctly backs up custom config when applying preset and restores it when clicking the same preset again.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket intermittently shows 'No activity yet' in Live Activity sidebar, but reconnects and displays grouped trades (10 trades / 1 groups, QBTS x10). Known issue from previous iteration.

seed_data_creation: None required - tested with existing tickers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features fully verified: 1) Live chart checkbox (chart-toggle-{SYMBOL}) shows LineChart with price history and trailing stop line when trailing is enabled. Card expands to col-span-2 when chart enabled. 2) Preset strategy toggle saves custom_backup when applying preset and restores values when clicking same preset again. WebSocket intermittent issue is pre-existing.

live_price_chart.col_span_2: Verified - AAPL/SPY cards span 2 columns when chart enabled
live_price_chart.trailing_stop_line: Verified - SPY chart shows 2 line curves (price + trailing stop dashed amber line)
live_price_chart.data_points: Verified - Shows '40 pts' after ~6 seconds of price data collection

preset_strategy_toggle.apply_preset: Conservative 1Y changes buy_offset=-5.0, avg_days=365, saves custom_backup
preset_strategy_toggle.toggle_off: Clicking same preset again restores original values from custom_backup
preset_strategy_toggle.websocket_handler: APPLY_STRATEGY action in WebSocket also handles toggle correctly

sidebar_grouped_trades.format: Shows '10 trades / 1 groups' with 'QBTS x10' grouped format

live_prices.tickers: AAPL, NVDA, QBTS, SPY, TSLA all showing live prices
